hook.summary: Rapid-fire montage showcasing diverse tank models, skins, and environments.
hook.visual_action: Tanks are shown driving under bridges, in garages, through water, and across snowy ruins in quick succession.

scene_flow: Rapid montage of tanks in diverse environments like bridges and garages.
Showcase of unique tank skins, including a rusty post-apocalyptic design.
Action shots of tanks navigating water and ruined urban landscapes.
Final shot of a floral-patterned tank firing its cannon.
audience_proxy: Mid-core male gamers who enjoy tank combat and vehicle customization.
